sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50030" key="i(ero/dakrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερό-δακρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υος</itype>, epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίβανος</foreign>, <sense id="n50030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with hallowed tears</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gum</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0373.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Melanipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
